featureName: BUG-004-H1: Silent query-error swallowing in WeeklySynthesis subqueries

completedPhaseClaims.summary: Stochastic-quality-sweep round 2 of 20 invoked harden trigger against spec 004. Inspection identified 6 silent `if err == nil { ... }` query/helper-failure swallowing sites in internal/intelligence/synthesis.go (4 in GenerateWeeklySynthesis, 2 in detectCapturePatterns). Pattern was the only Query-level outlier in the package — every other Query failure path already logs via slog.Warn.

Created BUG-004-H1 packet (spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, state.json, report.md, uservalidation.md, scenario-manifest.json) under specs/004-phase3-intelligence/bugs/. Documented root cause, fix design, and 3 Gherkin scenarios (BUG-004-H1-1/-2/-3).

Patched internal/intelligence/synthesis.go to replace all 6 `if err == nil { ... }` blocks with `if err != nil { slog.Warn(...) } else { ... }` shapes. Each warn line names the section (RunSynthesis, topic movement, open loops, Resurface, day-of-week, hour-of-day) so operators can grep failures.

Added TestSynthesisFile_NoSilentQueryErrorSwallowing structural regression test in internal/intelligence/synthesis_test.go that reads synthesis.go and fails if `if err == nil {` reappears. Adversarially validated by reintroducing the bug at line 152 — test failed with the expected message — then restored the fix and verified test passes again. Existing nil-pool guards (TestGenerateWeeklySynthesis_NilPool, TestDetectCapturePatterns_NilPool) already covered the fail-fast contract; no duplicate tests added.

Validated: `go test ./internal/intelligence/... -count=1 -timeout 240s` PASS (all tests including new structural regression). `go vet ./internal/intelligence/...` exit 0. `go build ./...` whole-tree clean. Adversarial reintroduction proved test catches regression.

Audited packet consistency: spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, state.json, scenario-manifest.json all agree on Done/Verified/Closed status. Edits confined to the BUG-004-H1 packet plus internal/intelligence/synthesis.go and internal/intelligence/synthesis_test.go. No source files outside the targeted area were modified.

report.md captures the harden trigger origin, the 6 affected sites, the fix shape, the test evidence, and the adversarial validation. uservalidation.md records operator-facing acceptance: the weekly synthesis path is now observably failure-tolerant rather than silently failure-tolerant.

executionHistory.summary: Single-pass parent-expanded harden-to-doc execution. Identified silent query-error swallowing in synthesis.go via harden trigger inspection. Created bug packet, patched 6 call sites, added structural regression test, adversarially validated, restored fix, full test suite green. Origin: stochastic-quality-sweep round 2 of 20.
